description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the ruby:2.3 Docker image and sets the JEKYLL_ENV variable to production. Add a before_script that runs `bundle install` for every job. Define a deploy stage with a `pages` job that runs only on the master branch, executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d public`, and publishes the `public` directory as an artifact. Also add a `pages-test` job in the same stage that runs on all branches except master, executes `bundle exec jekyll build -d export`, and publishes the `export` directory as an artifact.
